page_content:
Formerly: PUAF650.

PLCY660 Environmental Policy Workshop (3 Credits)

Students work as a team to analyze and recommend responses to a current enviornmental policy issue. Emphasizes problem definition, organization of information and presentation of results.

Restriction: Must be in a major in PLCY-School of Public Policy; or permission of PLCY-School of Public Policy.

Credit Only Granted for. PLCY660 or PUAF660.
